organic.title: VIT Vellore - Vellore Institute of Technology - Rankings, Placements
organic.snippet: VIT Vellore is ranked 11th in NIRF Engineering 2024. Total enrolled: ~22,000. Placement rate FY24: 81%. Median CTC: ₹6.5 LPA. Highest CTC: ₹84.5 LPA. Top recruiters: Microsoft, Amazon, Cisco, Cognizant, TCS, Infosys.

organic.title: VIT University NIRF Ranking 2024 — All Categories
organic.snippet: VIT Vellore NIRF ranks: Engineering #11 (score 64.78), University category #11. NAAC grade A++ (CGPA 3.66). AISHE code U-0426.
